description: Upload a video to one or more social media platforms. Supports TikTok, Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube, Facebook, X (Twitter), Threads, Pinterest, Bluesky, and Reddit. Supports immediate, async, scheduled, and queued uploads.

requestProperties.name: user
requestProperties.description: User profile identifier.

requestProperties.name: platform[]
requestProperties.description: Platform(s) to upload to.

requestProperties.name: video
requestProperties.description: The video file to upload (binary file) or a public video URL.

requestProperties.name: title
requestProperties.description: Default title/caption of the video. Required for YouTube and Reddit; optional for all other platforms. Platform-specific titles override this.

requestProperties.name: description
requestProperties.description: Optional extended text used on LinkedIn commentary, Facebook descriptions, YouTube descriptions, and Pinterest notes. Ignored elsewhere.

requestProperties.name: scheduled_date
requestProperties.description: ISO-8601 date/time to schedule publishing (e.g., '2025-12-31T23:45:00Z'). Must be in the future (≤365 days). Omit for immediate upload. Cannot be used with `add_to_queue`.

requestProperties.name: timezone
requestProperties.description: IANA timezone identifier (e.g., 'Europe/Madrid', 'America/New_York'). If provided, `scheduled_date` is interpreted in this timezone. Defaults to UTC.

requestProperties.name: async_upload
requestProperties.description: If true, returns immediately with a `request_id` and processes in the background. If false but upload takes >59s, automatically switches to async.

requestProperties.name: add_to_queue
requestProperties.description: If true, automatically schedules the post to the next available queue slot. Cannot be used with `scheduled_date`.

requestProperties.name: first_comment
requestProperties.description: Automatically post a first comment after publishing. Supported on Instagram, Facebook, Threads, Bluesky, Reddit, X, YouTube, and LinkedIn.

requestProperties.name: instagram_first_comment
requestProperties.description: [Instagram] Platform-specific first comment. Overrides `first_comment`.

requestProperties.name: facebook_first_comment
requestProperties.description: [Facebook] Platform-specific first comment. Overrides `first_comment`.

requestProperties.name: x_first_comment
requestProperties.description: [X] Platform-specific first comment. Overrides `first_comment`.

requestProperties.name: threads_first_comment
requestProperties.description: [Threads] Platform-specific first comment. Overrides `first_comment`.

requestProperties.name: youtube_first_comment
requestProperties.description: [YouTube] Platform-specific first comment. Overrides `first_comment`.

requestProperties.name: reddit_first_comment
requestProperties.description: [Reddit] Platform-specific first comment. Overrides `first_comment`.

requestProperties.name: bluesky_first_comment
requestProperties.description: [Bluesky] Platform-specific first comment. Overrides `first_comment`.

requestProperties.name: linkedin_first_comment
requestProperties.description: [LinkedIn] Platform-specific first comment. Overrides `first_comment`.

requestProperties.name: first_comment_media[]
requestProperties.description: Image files to attach to the first comment as inline images. Currently supported on Reddit. Not available for scheduled or queued posts.

requestProperties.name: instagram_title
requestProperties.description: [Instagram] Specific title. Fallbacks to `title`.

requestProperties.name: facebook_title
requestProperties.description: [Facebook] Specific title. Fallbacks to `title`. Ignored if facebook_media_type is STORIES.

requestProperties.name: tiktok_title
requestProperties.description: [TikTok] Specific title. Fallbacks to `title`.

requestProperties.name: linkedin_title
requestProperties.description: [LinkedIn] Specific title. Fallbacks to `title`.

requestProperties.name: x_title
requestProperties.description: [X] Specific title. Fallbacks to `title`.

requestProperties.name: youtube_title
requestProperties.description: [YouTube] Specific title. Fallbacks to `title`.

requestProperties.name: pinterest_title
requestProperties.description: [Pinterest] Specific title. Fallbacks to `title`.

requestProperties.name: threads_title
requestProperties.description: [Threads] Specific title. Fallbacks to `title`.

requestProperties.name: threads_topic_tag
requestProperties.description: [Threads] A topic tag for the post (1-50 characters). Cannot contain periods (.) or ampersands (&). One tag per post.

requestProperties.name: bluesky_title
requestProperties.description: [Bluesky] Specific text. Fallbacks to `title`.

requestProperties.name: reddit_title
requestProperties.description: [Reddit] Specific title. Fallbacks to `title`.

requestProperties.name: disable_duet
requestProperties.description: [TikTok] Disable duet feature.

requestProperties.name: disable_comment
requestProperties.description: [TikTok] Disable comments.

requestProperties.name: disable_stitch
requestProperties.description: [TikTok] Disable stitch feature.

requestProperties.name: cover_timestamp
requestProperties.description: [TikTok] Timestamp in milliseconds for video cover.

requestProperties.name: brand_content_toggle
requestProperties.description: [TikTok] Set to true for paid partnerships promoting third-party brands.

requestProperties.name: brand_organic_toggle
requestProperties.description: [TikTok] Set to true when promoting the creator's own business.

requestProperties.name: is_aigc
requestProperties.description: [TikTok] Indicates if content is AI-generated.

requestProperties.name: share_to_feed
requestProperties.description: [Instagram] Whether to share to feed (only for regular Reels, not Trial Reels).

requestProperties.name: collaborators
requestProperties.description: [Instagram] Comma-separated list of collaborator usernames. Not available for Trial Reels.

requestProperties.name: cover_url
requestProperties.description: [Instagram] URL for custom video cover. Alternative to cover_image binary upload.

requestProperties.name: cover_image
requestProperties.description: [Instagram] Binary cover image for Reels (JPEG, max 8MB). If both cover_image and cover_url are provided, cover_url takes precedence.

requestProperties.name: audio_name
requestProperties.description: [Instagram] Name of the audio track embedded in your video (Reels only).

requestProperties.name: user_tags
requestProperties.description: [Instagram] Comma-separated list of user tags.

requestProperties.name: location_id
requestProperties.description: [Instagram] Instagram location ID.

requestProperties.name: thumb_offset
requestProperties.description: [Instagram] Timestamp offset for video thumbnail.

requestProperties.name: linkedin_description
requestProperties.description: [LinkedIn] Sent as the LinkedIn commentary. If omitted, reuses `title`.

requestProperties.name: target_linkedin_page_id
requestProperties.description: [LinkedIn] LinkedIn page ID to upload to an organization page.

requestProperties.name: youtube_description
requestProperties.description: [YouTube] Populates snippet.description. If omitted, uses `title`.

requestProperties.name: tags
requestProperties.description: [YouTube] Array of video tags.

requestProperties.name: categoryId
requestProperties.description: [YouTube] Video category ID.

requestProperties.name: embeddable
requestProperties.description: [YouTube] Whether video is embeddable.

requestProperties.name: license
requestProperties.description: [YouTube] Video license ('youtube' or 'creativeCommon').

requestProperties.name: publicStatsViewable
requestProperties.description: [YouTube] Whether public stats are viewable.

requestProperties.name: thumbnail
requestProperties.description: [YouTube] Custom thumbnail image file (JPG/PNG/GIF/BMP, max 2MB). Not supported for Shorts.

requestProperties.name: thumbnail_url
requestProperties.description: [YouTube] Alternative: provide thumbnail as a public URL.

requestProperties.name: selfDeclaredMadeForKids
requestProperties.description: [YouTube] Explicit declaration for COPPA compliance.

requestProperties.name: containsSyntheticMedia
requestProperties.description: [YouTube] Declaration that video contains AI-generated content.

requestProperties.name: defaultLanguage
requestProperties.description: [YouTube] Language of title and description (BCP-47 code, e.g., 'es', 'en').

requestProperties.name: defaultAudioLanguage
requestProperties.description: [YouTube] Language of the video audio (BCP-47 code, e.g., 'es-ES', 'en-US').

requestProperties.name: allowedCountries
requestProperties.description: [YouTube] Comma-separated ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes where the video is allowed. Cannot be used with `blockedCountries`.

requestProperties.name: blockedCountries
requestProperties.description: [YouTube] Comma-separated ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes where the video is blocked. Cannot be used with `allowedCountries`.

requestProperties.name: hasPaidProductPlacement
requestProperties.description: [YouTube] Declaration of paid product placements for FTC compliance.

requestProperties.name: recordingDate
requestProperties.description: [YouTube] Recording date (ISO 8601, e.g., '2024-01-15T14:30:00Z').

requestProperties.name: facebook_page_id
requestProperties.description: [Facebook] Facebook Page ID where the video will be posted. Required for Facebook. Auto-detected if only one page is connected.

requestProperties.name: facebook_description
requestProperties.description: [Facebook] Sent as video description. Ignored for STORIES.

requestProperties.name: video_state
requestProperties.description: [Facebook] Desired state of the video.

requestProperties.name: x_long_text_as_post
requestProperties.description: [X] When true, publishes long text as a single post instead of a thread.

requestProperties.name: geo_place_id
requestProperties.description: [X] Place ID for geographic location.

requestProperties.name: nullcast
requestProperties.description: [X] Whether to publish without broadcasting (promoted-only posts).

requestProperties.name: for_super_followers_only
requestProperties.description: [X] Tweet exclusive for super followers.

requestProperties.name: community_id
requestProperties.description: [X] Community ID for posting to specific communities.

requestProperties.name: share_with_followers
requestProperties.description: [X] Share community post with followers.

requestProperties.name: direct_message_deep_link
requestProperties.description: [X] Link to take conversation to private Direct Message.

requestProperties.name: tagged_user_ids
requestProperties.description: [X] Array of user IDs to tag in the media (max 10).

requestProperties.name: reply_to_id
requestProperties.description: [X] ID of the tweet to reply to.

requestProperties.name: exclude_reply_user_ids
requestProperties.description: [X] User IDs to exclude from replying. Requires `reply_to_id`.

requestProperties.name: pinterest_description
requestProperties.description: [Pinterest] Pin description. If omitted, reuses `title`.

requestProperties.name: pinterest_board_id
requestProperties.description: [Pinterest] Pinterest board ID to publish to. Required when platform includes pinterest.

requestProperties.name: pinterest_alt_text
requestProperties.description: [Pinterest] Alt text for the video.

requestProperties.name: pinterest_link
requestProperties.description: [Pinterest] Destination link for the video Pin.

requestProperties.name: pinterest_cover_image_url
requestProperties.description: [Pinterest] URL of an image to use as the video cover.

requestProperties.name: pinterest_cover_image_content_type
requestProperties.description: [Pinterest] Content type of the cover image (e.g., image/jpeg).

requestProperties.name: pinterest_cover_image_data
requestProperties.description: [Pinterest] Base64 encoded cover image data.

requestProperties.name: pinterest_cover_image_key_frame_time
requestProperties.description: [Pinterest] Time in milliseconds of the video frame to use as cover.

requestProperties.name: subreddit
requestProperties.description: [Reddit] Name of the subreddit (without 'r/'). Required when platform includes reddit.

requestProperties.name: flair_id
requestProperties.description: [Reddit] ID of the flair to apply to the post.

description: Upload photos (and mixed media for Instagram/Threads carousels) to social media platforms. Supports TikTok, Instagram, LinkedIn, Facebook, X (Twitter), Threads, Pinterest, Bluesky, and Reddit.

requestProperties.name: user

requestProperties.name: platform[]
requestProperties.description: Platform(s) to upload to.

requestProperties.name: photos[]
requestProperties.description: Array of photo files. Instagram & Threads also accept videos for mixed carousels.

requestProperties.name: title
requestProperties.description: Default title/caption. Required for Reddit; optional for all other platforms. Platform-specific titles override this.

requestProperties.name: description
requestProperties.description: Optional extended text used on TikTok photo descriptions, LinkedIn commentary, Facebook descriptions, Pinterest notes, and Reddit bodies. Ignored elsewhere.

requestProperties.name: scheduled_date
requestProperties.description: ISO-8601 date/time to schedule publishing. Must be in the future (≤365 days). Cannot be used with `add_to_queue`.

requestProperties.name: timezone
requestProperties.description: IANA timezone identifier. Defaults to UTC.

requestProperties.name: async_upload
requestProperties.description: If true, returns immediately with a `request_id`.

requestProperties.name: add_to_queue
requestProperties.description: If true, schedules to next available queue slot. Cannot be used with `scheduled_date`.

requestProperties.name: first_comment
requestProperties.description: Automatically post a first comment after publishing.

requestProperties.name: instagram_first_comment
requestProperties.description: [Instagram] Platform-specific first comment.

requestProperties.name: facebook_first_comment
requestProperties.description: [Facebook] Platform-specific first comment.

requestProperties.name: x_first_comment
requestProperties.description: [X] Platform-specific first comment.

requestProperties.description: [Threads] Platform-specific first comment.

requestProperties.name: reddit_first_comment
requestProperties.description: [Reddit] Platform-specific first comment.

requestProperties.name: bluesky_first_comment
requestProperties.description: [Bluesky] Platform-specific first comment.

requestProperties.name: first_comment_media[]
requestProperties.description: One or more image files to attach to the first comment. Currently supported on Reddit. Not available for scheduled or queued posts.

requestProperties.name: instagram_title
requestProperties.description: [Instagram] Specific title.

requestProperties.name: facebook_title
requestProperties.description: [Facebook] Specific title.

requestProperties.name: tiktok_title
requestProperties.description: [TikTok] Specific title.

requestProperties.name: linkedin_title

requestProperties.name: pinterest_title
requestProperties.description: [Pinterest] Specific title.

requestProperties.name: threads_title
requestProperties.description: [Threads] Specific title.

requestProperties.name: threads_topic_tag
requestProperties.description: [Threads] A topic tag for the post (1-50 characters). Cannot contain periods (.) or ampersands (&). One tag per post.

requestProperties.name: bluesky_title
requestProperties.description: [Bluesky] Specific text.

requestProperties.name: reddit_title
requestProperties.description: [Reddit] Specific title.

requestProperties.name: linkedin_description

requestProperties.name: visibility

requestProperties.name: target_linkedin_page_id

requestProperties.name: facebook_page_id

requestProperties.name: x_long_text_as_post
requestProperties.description: [X] When true, publishes long text as a single post.

requestProperties.name: geo_place_id
requestProperties.description: [X] Place ID for geographic location.

requestProperties.name: nullcast
requestProperties.description: [X] Publish without broadcasting.

requestProperties.name: for_super_followers_only
requestProperties.description: [X] Exclusive for super followers.

requestProperties.name: community_id
requestProperties.description: [X] Community ID.

requestProperties.name: share_with_followers
requestProperties.description: [X] Share community post with followers.

requestProperties.name: direct_message_deep_link
requestProperties.description: [X] Direct Message deep link.

requestProperties.name: tagged_user_ids
requestProperties.description: [X] User IDs to tag in photos (max 10).

requestProperties.name: reply_to_id
requestProperties.description: [X] ID of the tweet to reply to.

requestProperties.name: exclude_reply_user_ids
requestProperties.description: [X] User IDs to exclude from replying.

requestProperties.name: auto_add_music
requestProperties.description: [TikTok] Automatically add background music to photos.

requestProperties.name: disable_comment

requestProperties.name: brand_content_toggle

requestProperties.name: brand_organic_toggle
requestProperties.description: [TikTok] Promoting the creator's own business.

requestProperties.name: photo_cover_index
requestProperties.description: [TikTok] Index (0-based) of the photo to use as cover/thumbnail.

requestProperties.name: tiktok_description
requestProperties.description: [TikTok] Description for photo posts.

requestProperties.name: collaborators
requestProperties.description: [Instagram] Comma-separated collaborator usernames.

requestProperties.name: user_tags
requestProperties.description: [Instagram] Comma-separated user tags.

requestProperties.name: location_id

requestProperties.name: pinterest_description

requestProperties.name: pinterest_board_id

requestProperties.name: pinterest_alt_text

description: Upload text-only posts to social media platforms. Supports X (Twitter), LinkedIn, Facebook, Threads, Reddit, and Bluesky. Automatically creates threads on X (>280 chars), Threads (>500 chars), and Bluesky (>300 chars).

requestProperties.name: user
requestProperties.description: User profile identifier.

requestProperties.name: platform[]
requestProperties.description: Platform(s) to upload to.

requestProperties.name: title
requestProperties.description: Default text content for the post.

requestProperties.name: description
requestProperties.description: Optional extended body used on Reddit (becomes post text). Ignored elsewhere.

requestProperties.name: scheduled_date
requestProperties.description: ISO-8601 date/time to schedule publishing. Cannot be used with `add_to_queue`.

requestProperties.name: timezone
requestProperties.description: IANA timezone identifier. Defaults to UTC.

requestProperties.name: async_upload
requestProperties.description: If true, returns immediately with a `request_id`.

requestProperties.name: add_to_queue
requestProperties.description: If true, schedules to next queue slot.

requestProperties.name: first_comment
requestProperties.description: Automatically post a first comment after publishing.

requestProperties.name: facebook_first_comment
requestProperties.description: [Facebook] Platform-specific first comment.

requestProperties.name: x_first_comment
requestProperties.description: [X] Platform-specific first comment.

requestProperties.name: threads_first_comment
requestProperties.description: [Threads] Platform-specific first comment.

requestProperties.name: reddit_first_comment
requestProperties.description: [Reddit] Platform-specific first comment.

requestProperties.name: bluesky_first_comment
requestProperties.description: [Bluesky] Platform-specific first comment.

requestProperties.name: first_comment_media[]
requestProperties.description: One or more image files to attach to the first comment. Currently supported on Reddit. Not available for scheduled or queued posts.

requestProperties.name: linkedin_title
requestProperties.description: [LinkedIn] Specific text for LinkedIn.

requestProperties.name: x_title
requestProperties.description: [X] Specific text for X.

requestProperties.name: facebook_title
requestProperties.description: [Facebook] Specific text for Facebook.

requestProperties.name: threads_title
requestProperties.description: [Threads] Specific text for Threads.

requestProperties.name: threads_topic_tag
requestProperties.description: [Threads] A topic tag for the post (1-50 characters). Cannot contain periods (.) or ampersands (&). One tag per post.

requestProperties.name: bluesky_title
requestProperties.description: [Bluesky] Specific text for Bluesky.

requestProperties.name: target_linkedin_page_id
requestProperties.description: [LinkedIn] LinkedIn page ID to post to an organization page.

requestProperties.name: x_long_text_as_post
requestProperties.description: [X] When true, long text is published as a single post.

requestProperties.name: quote_tweet_id
requestProperties.description: [X] ID of the tweet to quote. Mutually exclusive with `card_uri`, `poll_options`, and `direct_message_deep_link`.

requestProperties.name: geo_place_id
requestProperties.description: [X] Place ID for geographic location.

requestProperties.name: nullcast
requestProperties.description: [X] Publish without broadcasting.

requestProperties.name: for_super_followers_only
requestProperties.description: [X] Exclusive for super followers.

requestProperties.name: community_id
requestProperties.description: [X] Community ID.

requestProperties.name: share_with_followers
requestProperties.description: [X] Share community post with followers.

requestProperties.name: direct_message_deep_link
requestProperties.description: [X] Direct Message deep link. Mutually exclusive with `card_uri`, `quote_tweet_id`, and `poll_options`.

requestProperties.name: card_uri
requestProperties.description: [X] Card URI for Twitter Cards/ads. Mutually exclusive with `quote_tweet_id`, `direct_message_deep_link`, and `poll_options`.

requestProperties.name: poll_options
requestProperties.description: [X] Array of poll options (2-4 options, max 25 chars each). Mutually exclusive with `card_uri`, `quote_tweet_id`, and `direct_message_deep_link`.

requestProperties.name: poll_duration
requestProperties.description: [X] Poll duration in minutes (5-10080). Requires `poll_options`.

requestProperties.name: poll_reply_settings
requestProperties.description: [X] Who can reply to poll. Requires `poll_options`.

requestProperties.name: reply_to_id
requestProperties.description: [X/Bluesky] ID or URL of the post to reply to.

requestProperties.name: exclude_reply_user_ids
requestProperties.description: [X] User IDs to exclude from replying. Requires `reply_to_id`.

requestProperties.name: facebook_page_id
requestProperties.description: [Facebook] Facebook Page ID. Required when platform includes facebook. Auto-detected if only one page is connected.

requestProperties.name: facebook_link_url
requestProperties.description: [Facebook] Optional URL for link preview in text posts. Overrides generic `link_url` for Facebook.

requestProperties.name: link_url
requestProperties.description: Generic URL to include as a link preview card. Works for LinkedIn, Bluesky, Facebook, and Reddit. Platform-specific parameters (`linkedin_link_url`, `bluesky_link_url`, `facebook_link_url`, `reddit_link_url`) take priority.

requestProperties.name: linkedin_link_url
requestProperties.description: [LinkedIn] Optional URL for link preview card in text posts. Overrides generic `link_url` for LinkedIn.

requestProperties.name: bluesky_link_url
requestProperties.description: [Bluesky] Optional URL for external embed link preview in text posts. Overrides generic `link_url` for Bluesky.

requestProperties.name: reddit_link_url
requestProperties.description: [Reddit] URL for creating a Reddit link post with a URL preview card. Overrides generic `link_url` for Reddit.

requestProperties.name: threads_long_text_as_post
requestProperties.description: [Threads] If true, long text is a single post. If false, creates a thread if >500 chars.

requestProperties.name: subreddit
requestProperties.description: [Reddit] Subreddit name (without 'r/'). Required when platform includes reddit.

requestProperties.name: flair_id
requestProperties.description: [Reddit] Flair template ID.

description: Upload documents (PDF, PPT, PPTX, DOC, DOCX) to LinkedIn as native document posts displayed as carousels/viewers. Only LinkedIn is supported.

requestProperties.name: user
requestProperties.description: User profile identifier.

requestProperties.name: platform[]
requestProperties.description: Must be ["linkedin"]. Only LinkedIn supports document uploads.

requestProperties.name: document
requestProperties.description: The document file (PDF, PPT, PPTX, DOC, DOCX) or a public URL. Max 100MB, 300 pages.

requestProperties.name: title
requestProperties.description: Document title displayed on the post.

requestProperties.name: description
requestProperties.description: Post commentary/text that appears above the document.

requestProperties.name: target_linkedin_page_id
requestProperties.description: LinkedIn page ID to post to a company page instead of personal profile.

description: Check the status of asynchronous uploads (via `request_id`) or scheduled posts (via `job_id`). At least one parameter must be provided.

parameters.name: request_id
parameters.description: The request identifier returned by upload endpoints when `async_upload=true`.

parameters.name: job_id
parameters.description: The job identifier returned by scheduled posts (with `scheduled_date`).

description: Retrieve a paginated list of past uploads across all platforms, ordered most recent first.
Retrieve all pending scheduled posts for the authenticated user.
Cancel and delete a scheduled post and its associated assets.
Update the scheduled date, title, or caption of a scheduled post.

requestProperties.name: scheduled_date
requestProperties.description: New ISO-8601 date/time in UTC. Must be in the future and within 1 year.

requestProperties.name: title
requestProperties.description: New post title/caption.

requestProperties.name: caption
requestProperties.description: New caption/description.

description: Retrieve the current queue configuration (timezone, time slots, active days) for a profile.
Update the queue configuration (timezone, time slots, active days) for a profile.

requestProperties.name: profile_username
requestProperties.description: The profile to update settings for.

requestProperties.name: timezone
requestProperties.description: IANA timezone (e.g., 'Europe/London').

requestProperties.name: slots
requestProperties.description: Array of slot objects. Max 24 slots.

requestProperties.name: days_of_week
requestProperties.description: Active days: 0=Monday, 1=Tuesday, ..., 6=Sunday.

description: Preview the next upcoming queue slots and their availability for a profile.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of slots to return.

description: Get the next available queue slot for a profile.

Retrieve analytics data for a user profile across one or more social media platforms. Returns metrics like followers, views, impressions, reach, and time series data. Note: Instagram's API renamed 'impressions' to 'views'; both fields are returned for compatibility.

parameters.name: profile_username
parameters.description: The unique username of the profile.

parameters.name: platforms
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of platforms: instagram, tiktok, linkedin, facebook, x, youtube, threads, pinterest, reddit, bluesky.

parameters.name: page_id
parameters.description: Required for Facebook analytics. The Facebook Page ID.

parameters.name: page_urn
parameters.description: Optional for LinkedIn. Defaults to personal profile. Use Organization URN/ID for pages.

description: Retrieve Facebook page IDs associated with user profiles. Use the page_id for posting to Facebook pages.

parameters.name: profile
parameters.description: Profile username. If not specified, returns all pages for your account.

description: Retrieve LinkedIn company pages associated with the authenticated user's accounts. Use the page ID for posting to LinkedIn organization pages.

parameters.name: profile
parameters.description: Profile username. If omitted, returns pages from all connected LinkedIn accounts.

description: Retrieve all Pinterest boards (public and secret) from a connected Pinterest account. Use the board ID for posting Pins.

parameters.name: profile
parameters.description: Profile username. If omitted, uses the first connected Pinterest account.

description: Retrieve detailed posts from a Reddit account connected to a profile, including complete media information. Supports automatic pagination up to 2000 posts.

parameters.name: profile_username
parameters.description: Username of the profile with a connected Reddit account.

description: Verify the validity of your API key and retrieve basic account information including email and subscription plan.
Create a new user profile linked to a user on your platform.

requestProperties.name: username
requestProperties.description: A unique identifier for the user on your platform.

description: Retrieve a list of all user profiles created under your API key.
Delete an existing user profile and its associated data (including social connections).

requestProperties.name: username
requestProperties.description: The unique identifier of the profile to delete.

description: Retrieve information for a single user profile by username.

parameters.name: username
parameters.description: The username of the profile to retrieve.

description: Generate a secure, single-use URL containing a JWT. Users visit this URL to link their social media accounts. The JWT is valid for 48 hours.

requestProperties.name: username
requestProperties.description: The user profile identifier for which the JWT is generated.

requestProperties.name: redirect_url
requestProperties.description: URL to redirect to after linking social accounts.

requestProperties.name: logo_image
requestProperties.description: URL to a logo image for branding the linking page.

requestProperties.name: redirect_button_text
requestProperties.description: Text for the redirect button after linking.

requestProperties.name: connect_title
requestProperties.description: Custom title for the connection page.

requestProperties.name: connect_description
requestProperties.description: Custom description for the connection page.

requestProperties.name: platforms
requestProperties.description: Platforms to show for connection. Defaults to all supported platforms.

requestProperties.name: show_calendar
requestProperties.description: Whether to show the calendar view on the connection page.

description: Validate a JWT token and return the associated profile details. Uses Bearer token authentication.

Submit a media processing job using an FFmpeg command template. Supports single or multiple input files via multipart upload or JSON with URLs. Jobs are asynchronous — poll the status endpoint until finished.

requestProperties.name: file
requestProperties.description: Primary media file to process. Referenced as {input} or {input0}.

requestProperties.name: file1
requestProperties.description: Second input file. Referenced as {input1}.

requestProperties.name: file2
requestProperties.description: Third input file. Referenced as {input2}.

requestProperties.name: full_command
requestProperties.description: FFmpeg command template using {input}/{input0}, {input1}, etc. and {output} placeholders. Example: 'ffmpeg -y -i {input} -c:v libx264 -crf 23 {output}'

requestProperties.name: output_extension
requestProperties.description: Desired output file extension (e.g., 'mp4', 'wav', 'mp3', 'mov', 'webm').

requestProperties.name: publish
requestProperties.description: Whether to publish the result.

description: Poll the status of an FFmpeg processing job. Statuses: PENDING, PROCESSING, FINISHED, ERROR.
Download the processed file when job status is FINISHED. Returns binary media with appropriate Content-Type and Content-Disposition headers.
Check your current FFmpeg usage, remaining quota, and processing history for the current month.
Configure notification preferences for upload events. Supports webhook (POST to your URL) and Telegram notifications.

requestProperties.name: webhook_url
requestProperties.description: URL to receive webhook POST requests.

requestProperties.name: telegram_chat_id
requestProperties.description: Telegram chat ID for notifications.

requestProperties.name: webhook_events
requestProperties.description: List of webhook event types to subscribe to. If omitted, all events are enabled.

description: Retrieve a list of recent media (posts, reels, videos, pins, tweets, etc.) from a connected social media account. Supports Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, LinkedIn, Facebook, X (Twitter), Threads, Pinterest, Bluesky, and Reddit.

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: The platform to retrieve media from.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: Profile username as configured in Upload-Post.

parameters.name: page_urn
parameters.description: LinkedIn only. Selects which LinkedIn page to fetch posts from. Accepts a numeric organization ID (e.g., 12345), a full URN (e.g., urn:li:organization:12345), or 'me' to force the connected member's personal profile. If omitted, accounts connected as an organization admin auto-resolve to their first administered organization; otherwise the personal profile is used.

description: Retrieve comments on an Instagram post. Accepts a numeric media ID or a full Instagram post/reel URL. Supports cursor-based pagination via the `after` query parameter — loop while `pagination.has_next` is true. Comments are returned newest-first (reverse-chronological) per Meta Graph API v3.2+; ordering cannot be changed via query parameter.

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: Must be 'instagram'.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: Profile username as configured in Upload-Post.

parameters.name: post_id
parameters.description: Numeric Instagram media ID. Use post_id or post_url (one is required).

parameters.name: post_url
parameters.description: Full Instagram post or reel URL. Alternative to post_id.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Comments per page. Meta caps this edge at 50. Omit to use Meta's default (~25).

parameters.name: after
parameters.description: Pagination cursor returned in `pagination.next_cursor` of the previous response. Pass it back to fetch the next page.

description: Send a private reply (DM) to the author of a comment on your Instagram post. The comment must be less than 7 days old.

requestProperties.name: platform
requestProperties.description: Must be 'instagram'.

requestProperties.name: user
requestProperties.description: Profile username as configured in Upload-Post.

requestProperties.name: comment_id
requestProperties.description: ID of the comment to reply to (from Get Post Comments).

requestProperties.name: message
requestProperties.description: The private reply message text.

description: Retrieve the list of Instagram DM conversations for an account, including participants and recent messages.

parameters.name: platform
parameters.description: Must be 'instagram'.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: Profile username as configured in Upload-Post.

description: Send a direct message to an Instagram user using their IGSID. The recipient must have messaged your account first (24-hour messaging window policy enforced by Meta).

requestProperties.name: platform
requestProperties.description: Must be 'instagram'.

requestProperties.name: user
requestProperties.description: Profile username as configured in Upload-Post.

requestProperties.name: recipient_id
requestProperties.description: Instagram-Scoped User ID (IGSID) of the recipient.

requestProperties.name: message
requestProperties.description: The text message to send.

Docs-page endpoint for listing Google Business Profile locations connected to an Upload-Post account. Optional query parameter: profile. Use returned location name as gbp_location_id on upload requests.

parameters.name: profile
parameters.description: Optional profile username; limits locations to the Google Business account linked to that profile.
